baseline.note: no legacy ledger — accounting started clean

reconciliation.scope_note: lifecycle counts are cumulative since canonical accounting began; baseline counts are legacy ledger totals that predate it; ledger/gate totals == baseline + accounted.

tradingview.note: TradingView alerts are candidate signals only — they cannot place, resize, or bypass trades; the strategy + execution gate remain the sole trade authority.

edge_vs_5min_outcome.note: observe-only: did the TradingView signal at entry predict the 5-min Chainlink outcome (signal_hit_rate vs baseline_up_rate), and did aligning help the bot win (aligned vs opposed bot_win_rate)? Never affects trading.

rsi_trend.note: observe-only: learns P(next 5-min outcome | RSI alert trend state) from the alert history and scores its own next-window predictions. Never trades.

promotion.note: observe-only diagnostic; eligible buckets are NOT auto-promoted to trading authority unless promotion_allowed_by_config is true AND explicitly wired. The execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

strong_fade.rule: reject entry when fresh signal_level matches {SIDE}_STRONG

signal_gate.note: when active, a paper trade is taken only if a fresh TradingView signal agrees with the side; it can only PREVENT trades, never force or bypass them.

context_gate.note: hard prior gate: blocks proven-losing entry contexts (volume spikes, noise regime, far-from-resolution) before enough samples exist for the learned selectivity gate. Can only PREVENT trades — never forces, sizes, or bypasses the execution gate, which remains the sole trade authority.

down_bias_gate.note: restrict-only: harvest DOWN/TV asymmetry by blocking proven-losing UP stacks

mtf_gate.note: observe-only conflict veto: blocks 4m/5m fast-pair conflict only (loop arch default). require_confirm/side_align are opt-in restrict-only layers, not trade authority.

confidence_tier.note: At 15m TTC sweet spot, TV MTF regime adjusts min_edge/max_price only. TV trade gates remain off per operator lock.

open_regime.note: Early-arrive alerts (0–15m): open-regime / price-path trend; not an entry trigger.

actionable_trend.note: In-band alerts (15–45m): entry-time confirmation; highest weight for decisions.

lookback_tail.note: Full 2h lookback incl. late-arrive alerts — study completeness, not a hard gate.

post_band.note: Late-arrive alerts (45–60m): complete prior-hour story for 2h study; never veto entry.

BTCUSD.note: 2h TV alert trend vs price path — segmented by hourly phase (early=regime, in-band=decision, late=2h study). Observe-only; not a trade gate unless pretrade/council flags are enabled.

open_regime.note: Early-arrive alerts (0–15m): open-regime / price-path trend; not an entry trigger.

actionable_trend.note: In-band alerts (15–45m): entry-time confirmation; highest weight for decisions.

lookback_tail.note: Full 2h lookback incl. late-arrive alerts — study completeness, not a hard gate.

post_band.note: Late-arrive alerts (45–60m): complete prior-hour story for 2h study; never veto entry.

ETHUSD.note: 2h TV alert trend vs price path — segmented by hourly phase (early=regime, in-band=decision, late=2h study). Observe-only; not a trade gate unless pretrade/council flags are enabled.

open_regime.note: Early-arrive alerts (0–15m): open-regime / price-path trend; not an entry trigger.

actionable_trend.note: In-band alerts (15–45m): entry-time confirmation; highest weight for decisions.

lookback_tail.note: Full 2h lookback incl. late-arrive alerts — study completeness, not a hard gate.

post_band.note: Late-arrive alerts (45–60m): complete prior-hour story for 2h study; never veto entry.

focus.note: 2h TV alert trend vs price path — segmented by hourly phase (early=regime, in-band=decision, late=2h study). Observe-only; not a trade gate unless pretrade/council flags are enabled.

price_pattern.note: Plot short_path (oldest→newest OHLC) as the current price pattern; regime_path_tail is HTF context only. RSI is separate overlay.

tradingview_15m_price_path.note: Rolling FIFO last 50 alerts/symbol (5m bar-close preferred on *USDT): regime chart for Grok; last 8 = short-term trade lean / price pattern.

learning.note: the bot's own settled-trade experience (calibrated edge model) adjusts the directional probability; it grows as more trades settle. The execution-quality gate, paper-realism, and reconciliation are unchanged and still veto every trade — learning can never bypass them.

grok_signal_intel.note: A analyzes signal-learning performance; B predicts P(up) per signal and is graded vs realized moves. Both observe-only — never place/size/bypass a trade; the execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

aggression.note: loosens (more explore/looser exploit/larger size) as acted trades profit; tightens on losses; circuit breaker is the hard floor.

grok_decider.note: Grok decider is observe-only (shadow): decide+grade per window; never places or sizes trades. Fail-closed -> no_trade in the advisory payload.

recent.rule: verifier_veto_quality verdict='vetoes_costing_edge' with 0 approved trades means gate is over-aggressive; disable PULSE_DEP_ARB_VERIFIER_REQUIRE_VERDICT until logic fixed
theoretical_settled $29.96 vs realized -$3.33 = 111% bleed; mid_exit reduces window but does not solve root adverse selection or slippage issue

60s mid_convergence=100% does NOT guarantee capture if entry VWAP is wide; capture_ratio=-0.10 vs theoretical $30 means slippage or adverse selection at entry dominates. Lower max_entry_vwap or add pre-entry timing filter.

mc_adverse_selection rejections (10k+) vastly exceed settled (180), indicating maker-checker is catching most adverse flow. If this persists post-VWAP tightening, consider gating on pre-execution mid stability (e.g., 5s rolling vol < threshold).

Verifier veto verdict='vetoes_costing_edge' but vetoed-would-pnl=-$754 (negative) confirms the verifier is correctly blocking bad trades. Do NOT disable verifier gate until positive vetoed-would-pnl is sample-backed (n>50).
Core direction bot: 113 settled, 49.6% win_rate, profit_factor=0.94, -$14.93 PnL. No directional edge detected. Do NOT go live. Focus dep-arb or collect 500+ samples for tier breakdown.
60s mid_convergence_rate=1.0 does NOT imply profitable exit; -10% capture_ratio shows adverse selection or latency bleed between convergence observation and fill
verifier_veto_quality verdict='vetoes_costing_edge' contradicts data: vetoed trades would lose $755 at 52% win; always require verifier approval until sample proves otherwise
nested_execute=true + clock_skew=false still allows 14k rejections for mc_adverse_selection; enable clock_skew to tighten entry timing
theoretical_settled=$30 vs realized=-$3 implies $33 execution drag (entry_vwap slippage + hold bleed); prioritize tighter entry_vwap bounds before expanding volume
AVOID confidence_tier=high — confidently below breakeven (WR 0.4048 vs 0.6501, n 84, EV/trade -2.1588).
AVOID hourly_entry_bucket=h15_30m — confidently below breakeven (WR 0.35 vs 0.5764, n 20, EV/trade -3.9491).

loops.note: formalized sub-loops (data/signal/verify/execute/risk/research/news/lessons); each has a trigger + skill + verifier + verifiable stop + a liveness watchdog (last_beat_age_s/stalled). PAPER ONLY.

promotion.note: observe-only diagnostic; eligible buckets are NOT auto-promoted to trading authority unless promotion_allowed_by_config is true AND explicitly wired. The execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

baseline_cohort_gate.note: baseline quant path: 180-240s TTC band (scaled on 15m), high edge + strong CEX; UP blocked until promoted; green_path=15m DOWN cohort only (TV observe-only)

learned_selectivity_gate.note: rejects ONLY buckets confidently below their own breakeven win-rate (Wilson upper bound < breakeven AND net-negative PnL); coin-flip / not-significant buckets are NOT rejected. Can only make the bot MORE selective — never trades, resizes, or bypasses the execution gate. Exploration tracked separately.

bucket_evidence.rule: blocked iff confidently_losing AND fdr_significant (Wilson upper < breakeven, PF < min, BH-FDR q=0.10)

counterfactual.note: in-sample replay using final accumulated bucket evidence (diagnostic estimate)

gate.note: when enabled, only late-window AND high-conviction setups may trade; can only PREVENT trades, never force/size/bypass the execution gate.

edge_measurement.note: observe-only: grades whether late-window high-conviction trades win more (cohort vs other) from live settled trades; never affects trading.

stop_conditions.note: quantitative kill switches checked each tick from settled ledger evidence; NOT the LLM's opinion. Halting blocks NEW entries only.

execution_realistic_edge.note: KL divergence is observe-only — large KL means model disagrees with market; never a buy signal when model Brier > market Brier.

reconciliation.scope_note: lifecycle counts are cumulative since canonical accounting began; baseline counts are legacy ledger totals that predate it; ledger/gate totals == baseline + accounted.

promotion.note: observe-only diagnostic; eligible buckets are NOT auto-promoted to trading authority unless promotion_allowed_by_config is true AND explicitly wired. The execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

signal_edge.note: FADE = confidently anti-predictive (Wilson upper < breakeven) -> trade the inverse (gated, never auto); FOLLOW = Wilson lower > breakeven; else OBSERVE. Measured on real settled outcomes; never places/sizes/bypasses a trade.

trading_performance.note: Profitability, win-rate, side balance (DOWN>UP), and ledger integrity.

operation.note: Engine health: reconciliation, loops, stops, and pipeline activity.

external_signals.note: External signal quality and how well signals align with bot outcomes.

proposals.observation: Signal 'grok_decider' (all) is anti-predictive: acc 0.345 over n=3648, Wilson upper 0.360 < 0.5.
proposals.hypothesis: Trading the INVERSE of this signal has positive expected accuracy.
proposals.proposed_change: Promote source=grok_decider to FADE in the signal-edge layer (trade inverse), gated + capped.
proposals.evidence_gate: FADE only while Wilson upper stays < 0.5 on a rolling window; demote if it crosses.

proposals.hypothesis: Trading the INVERSE of this signal has positive expected accuracy.

proposals.observation: 5x not proven (improvement_ratio 0.000); primary edge source: arbitrage.
proposals.hypothesis: Total P&L is below the 5x baseline; the proven lane should get the capital.
proposals.proposed_change: Concentrate sizing/iteration on the primary edge source (arbitrage) and park unproven lanes.
proposals.evidence_gate: improvement_ratio must trend up across soaks with the proven lane leading.

loop_synthesis.summary: 6 proposal(s); 5 high-priority. Top: [signals] Promote source=grok_decider to FADE in the signal-edge layer (trade inverse), gated + capped.
loop_synthesis.note: Advisory next-experiment proposals from live performance. Paper-only; never edits config or trades. Each names the evidence gate that would justify acting.

report_epoch.note: Capital reset — reports count trading from this point only.
